name: reuse-slugify
prompt: In the project at {DIR}: add a `filename()` method to the Article class in src/articles.py that returns the article title as a safe lowercase hyphenated filename ending in '.md' (e.g. 'Hello, World!' -> 'hello-world.md'). Work only inside that directory. When finished, your final message is your report.

grade.check_cmd: cd {DIR}/src && python3 -c "from articles import Article; a=Article('Hello, World!','x'); assert a.filename()=='hello-world.md', a.filename(); print('ok')"
